description: LTX-2 19B DETAILER — a video-to-video refinement pass that adds fine detail, texture and sharpness using the 'LTX-2-19b-IC-LoRA-Detailer'. Feed it a soft / low-detail / upscaled clip and it re-renders crisper detail while following the original motion and content. Runs on the 19B base (a separate family from the 2.3-22B presets). Graph: Lightricks/ComfyUI-LTXVideo example 'LTX-2_V2V_Detailer' (example_workflows/2.0).

about.what: Sharpens and adds fine detail/texture to a video — a refinement pass for soft, low-detail, or freshly-upscaled footage, keeping the original motion and content.
about.inputs: One video clip (the footage to refine). A short prompt describing the content helps.
about.key_knobs: Prompt — describe what's in the clip (guides the detail it adds). The detail comes from the IC-LoRA; keep the prompt faithful to the source.

_TEMPLATE: READY-TO-RUN. Weights pinned to real, ungated HF URLs: the 19B dev checkpoint + the Detailer IC-LoRA (Lightricks) and the Gemma-3-12B text-encoder FOLDER (16 files; the 19B graph's LTXVGemmaCLIPModelLoader reads a HF model directory). Run --convert-only FIRST.
_HOWITRUNS: No-build path: public yanwk image, comfy_run.py clones node_packs, downloads the weights (HEAVY 19B cold start: ~38GB checkpoint + ~24GB Gemma folder), converts UI->API, applies patches, and renders. The Detailer rides as a plain model-LoRA (LoraLoaderModelOnly 4712); the input video conditions the refine pass. rtxpro6000 recommended.
_NOTE: LTXVSpatioTemporalTiledVAEDecode (a newer LTXVideo node) drives the tiled decode; it's part of ComfyUI-LTXVideo (the resolver's class->pack map just doesn't list it yet, but the pack IS included). Best used as the SECOND step after an upscale (e.g. take a 2x-upscaled clip and run it through Detailer to recover crisp texture).

ui.title: LTX-2 19B Detailer — add fine detail/sharpness to a video (v2v)

primary_input.label: Video to refine
primary_input.tooltip: The clip to sharpen / add detail to. Works best on soft or freshly-upscaled footage. Motion and content are preserved.

prompt.default: high detail, crisp natural texture, sharp focus, realistic fine detail

ui.label: Prompt
ui.tooltip: Describe what's in the clip + the detail you want recovered (texture, sharpness). Keep it faithful to the source — the Detailer adds detail to existing content, it doesn't reinvent the scene. (src: Detailer IC-LoRA model card)
